title: Introduction to Mitosis
description: Watch the short video on mitosis, then answer the comprehension questions below to check your understanding.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of mitosis?
options: Producing genetically identical daughter cells for growth and repair
questions.answer: Producing genetically identical daughter cells for growth and repair

questions.question: During which phase do chromosomes line up along the middle of the cell?
Name the phase of mitosis where sister chromatids are pulled apart to opposite poles of the cell.
Based on the video, describe what happens during each of the four main phases of mitosis, in order.
